name: Classic Granny Square
description: A guided five-round granny square using double-crochet clusters and chain spaces.
hook: Choose a hook to suit your yarn
source: Built from the original Granny Square Crochet Guide

steps.title: Make a slip knot
steps.instruction: Make a slip knot.

steps.title: Chain 5
steps.instruction: Chain 5.

steps.title: Form the ring
steps.instruction: Insert the hook into the first chain and slip stitch to form a ring.

steps.title: Chain 6
steps.instruction: Chain 6. The first 3 chains count as 1 double crochet; the remaining 3 chains form the first corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the centre ring.

steps.title: Chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3 to form the second corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the centre ring.

steps.title: Chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3 to form the third corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the centre ring.

steps.title: Chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3 to form the fourth corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×2
steps.instruction: Work 2 double crochets into the centre ring.

steps.title: Join the round
steps.instruction: Slip stitch into the third chain of the beginning chain 6.

steps.title: Check Round 1
steps.instruction: You should have four 3-double-crochet groups and four chain-3 corner spaces.

steps.title: Chain 6
steps.instruction: Chain 6. The first 3 chains count as 1 double crochet; the remaining 3 chains form the starting corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the same starting corner space.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1 before moving to the next corner.

steps.title: Corner 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 2.

steps.title: Corner 2: chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 2.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1 before moving on.

steps.title: Corner 3: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 3.

steps.title: Corner 3: chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 3: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 3.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1 before moving on.

steps.title: Corner 4: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 4.

steps.title: Corner 4: chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 4: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 4.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1 before moving on.

steps.title: Finish starting corner: double crochet ×2
steps.instruction: Work 2 double crochets into the starting corner space.

steps.title: Join the round
steps.instruction: Slip stitch into the third chain of the beginning chain 6.

steps.title: Check Round 2
steps.instruction: Each corner should contain 3 double crochets, chain 3, then 3 double crochets.

steps.title: Chain 6
steps.instruction: Chain 6. The first 3 chains count as 1 double crochet; the remaining 3 chains form the starting corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the same starting corner space.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Side 1: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the chain-1 space on side 1.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 2.

steps.title: Corner 2: chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 2.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the chain-1 space on side 2.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 3.

steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 3.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the chain-1 space on side 3.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 4.

steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 4.

steps.title: Side 4: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the chain-1 space on side 4.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Finish starting corner: double crochet ×2
steps.instruction: Work 2 double crochets into the starting corner space.

steps.title: Join the round
steps.instruction: Slip stitch into the third chain of the beginning chain 6.

steps.title: Check Round 3
steps.instruction: Each side should have one 3-double-crochet group between the corners.

steps.title: Chain 6
steps.instruction: Chain 6. The first 3 chains count as 1 double crochet; the remaining 3 chains form the starting corner.

steps.title: Double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into the same starting corner space.

steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Side 1, space 1: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 1, chain-1 space 1.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 1, chain-1 space 2.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 2.

steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 2.

steps.title: Side 2, space 1: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 2, chain-1 space 1.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 2, chain-1 space 2.

steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 3.

steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 3.

steps.title: Side 3, space 1: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 3, chain-1 space 1.

steps.title: Chain 1

steps.title: Side 3, space 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 3, chain-1 space 2.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Corner 4: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into corner 4.

steps.title: Corner 4: chain 3
steps.instruction: Chain 3.

steps.title: Corner 4: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 more double crochets into corner 4.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Side 4, space 1: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 4, chain-1 space 1.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Side 4, space 2: double crochet ×3
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into side 4, chain-1 space 2.

steps.title: Chain 1
steps.instruction: Chain 1.

steps.title: Finish starting corner: double crochet ×2
steps.instruction: Work 2 double crochets into the starting corner space.

steps.title: Join the round
steps.instruction: Slip stitch into the third chain of the beginning chain 6.

steps.title: Check Round 4
steps.instruction: Each side should have two 3-double-crochet groups between the corners.

steps.title: Repeat the round structure
steps.instruction: For each new round, add one more 3-double-crochet group along every side.

steps.title: Corner rule
steps.instruction: In each full corner, work 3 double crochets, chain 3, then 3 double crochets.

steps.title: Side rule
steps.instruction: Work 3 double crochets into every chain-1 side space, with chain 1 between groups.

steps.title: Cut the yarn
steps.instruction: Cut the yarn, leaving a tail.

steps.title: Fasten off
steps.instruction: Pull the yarn through the final loop and tighten gently.

steps.title: Weave in the tails
steps.instruction: Weave in the centre and finishing tails.
